summary: iOS | OSPREY | Popup about update for Charge Case appears after launching the app
scenario: Brief popup about Charge Case firmware update appears momentarily after launching Poly Studio Mobile app with Voyager Free 60+ on outdated firmware
description_clean: After pairing Poly Voyager Free 60+ with the app, if the Charge Case is on outdated firmware, a popup about updating the Charge Case appears briefly (for a split second) after launching the app. This popup should not appear for the Free 60+ charge case since firmware updates for it can be performed via the mobile app.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Pair the Poly Voyager Free 60+ with the app via Bluetooth.
3. Ensure the Charge Case is on outdated firmware.
4. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Observe the popup that appears upon launching the app.
expected: No popup about updating the Charge Case firmware should appear, as firmware updates for the Free 60+ charge case can be performed via the mobile app.
actual: A popup about updating the Charge Case appears briefly (for a split second) after launching the app.
